text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, November 06. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
